name: Fettuccine with Chicken-Pepper Sauce
recipeIngredient: 3/4 lb Skinless, boneless chicken breast halves, cut into strips
10 3/4 oz Can sodium-reduced, condensed cream of chicken or celery soup
1/2 cup Shredded reduced-fat cheddar or Swiss cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package directions; drain well. Keep warm.
2. Spray a cold large skillet with non-stick coating. Preheat skillet over medium heat.
3. Stir-fry broccoli, pepper squares, and onion for 3 to 4 minutes; remove from the skillet.
4. Add oil to the skillet.
5. Add the chicken strips; stir-fry for 3 to 4 minutes or until no longer pink.
6. Add the condensed soup, basil, and 1/2 cup water to the skillet; mix thoroughly.
7. Stir in the vegetable mixture. Bring to boiling; reduce heat.
8. Add cheese; cook and stir until cheese is almost melted.
9. Serve over hot pasta.
